creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
If Clang crashes try a newer version from ports or report upstream (LLVM, ICU or Mozilla). As of ports r422711 bundled ICU 56.1 (even in Firefox 52.0) is older than ICU 57.1 we have.

Otherwise, you may need to find a commit that fixed the issue in more recent FreeBSD releases then request MFC.
